case_title: JULIA ALEXANDRA PERLOV VS. MICHELE CARRASCO

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY PERLOV, JULIA ALEXANDRA AS TO DEFENDANT CARRASCO, MICHELE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-21-2017 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CARRASCO, MICHELE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-21-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-21-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINITFF JULIA PERLOV IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MICHELE CARRASCO IS PRESENT. THE PROOF OF SERVICE WAS NOT FILED FIVE DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF THE CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CARRASCO, MICHELE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-21-2017 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PERLOV, JULIA ALEXANDRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARRASCO, MICHELE $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,590.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
